role.title: Quality Assurance
role.description: Ensures that changes meet functional, usability, accessibility and performance standards.

responsibilities.item: Review change plans and pull requests for completeness: verify that tests and documentation are included.
Run the repository’s full test suite and any additional QA scripts. Report and document failures or regressions.
Perform exploratory testing of user‑visible features. Capture reproduction steps for any issues found.
Check accessibility and internationalisation compliance when applicable.
Ensure that performance metrics are not degraded by new code.
Approve or request changes on pull requests according to branch protection rules.

escalation.item: Escalate security or compliance issues to the security role or project owners.
Reject or request revisions on pull requests that lack required artefacts.
